crops.name: wheat
crops.guidelines: Sow certified seeds after treating them with Carbendazim. Maintain soil moisture during crown root initiation (21 days after sowing).

crops.name: rice
crops.guidelines: Ensure nursery bed is well-fertilized. Transplant 25-30 days old seedlings. Keep water depth at 5cm for the first week post-transplant.

soil_health.characteristics: High clay content, deep cracks in summer, high moisture retention capacity.
soil_health.recommended_treatment: Add gypsum if soil is overly alkaline. Apply rich organic compost or farmyard manure.

soil_health.characteristics: Low water retention, high aeration, nutrient leaching issues.
soil_health.recommended_treatment: Incorporate green manure crops like dhaincha or sunnhemp. Frequent light irrigation.

pest_management.symptoms: Yellowing of leaves, sticky fluid (honeydew) on leaves, soot fungus growth.
pest_management.organic_control: Spray neem oil solution (5ml/liter of water mixed with 1ml liquid soap). Install yellow sticky traps (10-15 per acre).
pest_management.chemical_control: Spray Imidacloprid 17.8 SL at 0.5 ml/liter if whitefly threshold exceeds 6-8 per leaf.

pest_management.symptoms: Drying of central shoot (dead heart) or white panicles (white ear).
pest_management.organic_control: Release Trichogramma chilonis egg cards (50,000 eggs/acre). Set up pheromone traps.
pest_management.chemical_control: Apply Cartap Hydrochloride 4G granules at 10 kg/acre.

fertilizers.name: urea
fertilizers.guidelines: Apply urea in split doses to minimize leaching. Avoid broadcasting on wet soil before rain.

fertilizers.name: npk
fertilizers.guidelines: Use 19:19:19 for early foliar spray and 12:32:16 as basal application for balanced nutrition.

irrigation.benefits: Saves up to 60% water, reduces weeds, delivers nutrients directly to root zones.
irrigation.guidelines: Clean lateral filters regularly to prevent clogging. Run for 1-2 hours daily depending on soil moisture.

irrigation.benefits: Simulates natural rain, checks soil erosion, frost control.
irrigation.guidelines: Do not operate during high winds. Maintain uniform nozzle pressure.

government_schemes.name: pm kisan
government_schemes.benefits: ₹6,000 per year in 3 equal installments of ₹2,000.
government_schemes.eligibility: Small and marginal farmer families owning cultivable land.
government_schemes.how_to_apply: Register online at pmkisan.gov.in using Aadhaar, bank details, and land records.

government_schemes.name: crop insurance
government_schemes.benefits: Financial support for crop loss due to natural calamities, pests, or disease.
government_schemes.premium: 2% for Kharif, 1.5% for Rabi, 5% for commercial/horticultural crops.
government_schemes.how_to_apply: Submit application on pmfby.gov.in or local bank within 72 hours of sowing/damage.
